body.description: On a melee hit, you can make one extra attack roll against a different creature within 5 feet of the original target. Damage is the weapon's damage without the ability modifier.
On a melee miss, the target takes damage equal to the ability modifier used for the attack roll. Damage is the same type as the weapon's.
When you make the extra attack of the Light property with this weapon, you can make it as part of the Attack action instead of as a Bonus Action.
On a hit, you can push the target up to 10 feet straight away from you if it is Large or smaller.
On a hit, the target has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.
On a hit, the target's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. The effect doesn't stack with itself.
On a hit, the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 + your ability modifier + your Proficiency Bonus) or have the Prone condition.
On a hit, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against the target before the end of your next turn.
